summary: Ukrainian drone operators from the 1st "Azov" corps are targeting Russian logistics near Donetsk, including routes through Zuhres, Andriivka, Starobesheve, Horlivka, Lysychansk, and the Donetsk Ring Road, highlighting gaps in Russian air defense. On April 16, the SBS Birds conducted a coordinated strike on Russian layered defenses, hitting three air defense systems, two Iskander bases, the Rubicon base, two oil depots, and 16 military targets in total, with the 9th "Kayros" squadron targeting Iskander OTRK bases in Crimea. Meanwhile, the Russian Rubicon Center reported destroying 105 Ukrainian targets on April 16 and 107 on April 15, including personnel, fixed-wing UAVs, and coordinating with Russian Aerospace Forces to neutralize UAV launch points. On the ground, FPV drones were used to kill Russian soldiers attempting to assault Ukrainian positions on motorcycles and another who feigned surrender before fleeing toward comrades in the Kostiantynivka direction, where Ukrainian forces survived an FPV attack after detecting the drone with a detector.
